top_signals.title: Indonesian Market Selloff Eases as Rupiah, Bonds, Stocks Rebound
top_signals.summary: Indonesian assets rebounded after officials stepped up efforts to reassure foreign investors, driving the rupiah to its biggest gain in more than a year while easing pressure on bonds and lifting stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
